title: The Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946
title_en: The Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946
description: An Act to give Hindu married women a right to separate residence and maintenance under certain circumstances. WHEREAS it is expedient to provide for the right to separate residence and maintenance under certain circumstances in the case of Hindu married women; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title and extent
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Act may be called the Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946 .
(2) It extends to the whole of [Bangladesh].

provisions.title: 2. Grounds for claiming separate residence and maintenance
3. Amount of maintenance
provisions.content: 3. When allowing a claim for separate residence and maintenance under section 2, the Court shall determine the amount to be paid by the husband to the wife therefore, and in so doing shall have regard to the social standing of the parties and the extent of the husband's means.
